# Bundled ViGEm client

`ViGEmClient.dll` is the 64-bit user-space client extracted unchanged from the
official `vgamepad` v0.1.0 source archive:

- Source: <https://github.com/yannbouteiller/vgamepad/releases/tag/v0.1.0>
- SHA-256: `2BF0CB1D809039573C922737D298A1653D4DBC61408060FF45A9BCFDE82E97D2`
- License: MIT; see [`vgamepad-LICENSE.txt`](vgamepad-LICENSE.txt)

This is only the user-space client. The retired ViGEmBus kernel driver is not
bundled, installed, or modified by this repository.
